case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. PERCY MANUEL LOPEZ COLAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT COLAN, PERCY MANUEL LOPEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT PERCY MANUEL LOPEZ COLAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLAN, PERCY MANUEL LOPEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2017 - JUDGMENT.
